data.title: 国际服玄龙门社团剧情PV公开
data.summary: An unexpected clash between the Black Tortoise Promenade and the Peking Opera Club, centered around
data.body:
An unexpected clash between the Black Tortoise Promenade and the Peking Opera Club, centered around Kisaki, president of Genryumon?!

The future of Shanhaijing rests in Kisaki's hands...
What path will Kisaki take?

➡️PV: https://youtu.be/vYOGclO3t-U
